name: Search for Password Files using Select-String (Windows)
notes:
This rule triggers when a search is made for the string "password" using the Select-String PowerShell command.
This behaviour could indicate a malicious actor searching for files containing passwords.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Command Execution Success
when the event matches LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?select-string.*?password.*' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Search for Password Files using Select-String (Windows) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Command Execution Success
AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?select-string.*?password.*' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Search for Password Files using Select-String
Event description: a search for password files using Select-String has been detected.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
